assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-24 contain '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and '|---|---|---|---|' followed by an empty line — no data rows present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 25-29 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 31-37 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and '### Limitations' with 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 18-21 state: 'No tools matching the Serena naming pattern (mcp__<instance>__find_symbol, mcp__<instance>__get_symbols_overview, etc.) were found' and '**Result**: No Serena MCP servers discovered'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 28-29 state: 'No Atlassian MCP tools found (no tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__)' and 'MCP discovery not available — prompted user for fallback options'. Line 30 states: 'User chose manual entry (option 2)'. Lines 34-39 document the manually provided fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 22 states: 'User chose to continue without code intelligence'. This indicates the user was prompted about the choice to continue or set up Serena.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 39-44 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 95-97 document: 'No existing Security Configuration found', 'User declined to enable security triage', 'Security Configuration skipped'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — confirmed by full file read (lines 1-48).
